name: Chatbot
description: NFT-gated chatbot platform with addon marketplace, ZK-wrapped feature protection, and Solana smart contract integration.

tasks.title: L3 Spec: NFT-gated addon architecture
tasks.description: Draft SSOT-L3-CHATBOT-NFT-ADDONS.md. Covers: NFT purchase flow, signed activation proof, local verification, anti-clone (wallet-bound), WASM compilation, Solana program design.

tasks.title: Smart contract: addon NFT minting program
tasks.description: Solana program for minting addon NFTs. Each NFT represents a feature unlock (icons, multi-bot, custom themes, etc). Returns signed activation proof on verify.

tasks.title: Feature gate system in chatbot code
tasks.description: Local verification layer: check stored activation proofs on load, gate premium features, WASM-compiled verification module.

tasks.title: Addon marketplace UI
tasks.description: Dashboard section showing available addons, prices (in $RCT tokens), owned status, one-click purchase via wallet.

tasks.title: Icon picker integration (done)
tasks.description: Icon selection UI for chatbot creation with ResonantOS icons + emoji + custom. Backend DB migration for icon/icon_type fields.

tasks.title: Base chatbot: define free vs premium features
tasks.description: Decide feature tiers. Free: 1 chatbot, basic theme, no icons. Premium addons: multi-bot, icon packs, custom themes, analytics, knowledge base upload.

tasks.title: Anti-tamper: WASM compilation + integrity checks
tasks.description: Compile verification logic to WASM. Add integrity checksums. Raise reverse-engineering barrier for 99% of users.
